goal: I want to transition from marketing to data science

matched_occupation.label: data analyst
matched_occupation.description: Data analysts import, inspect, clean, transform, validate, model, or interpret collections of data with regard to the business goals of the company. They ensure that the data sources and repositories provide consistent and reliable data. Data analysts use different algorithms and IT tools as demanded by the situation and the current data. They might prepare reports in the form of visualisations such as graphs, charts, and dashboards.

learning_path.title: Introduction to Data Handling and Ethics
objectives: Understand the basics of data, its ethical implications, and how to prepare it for analysis.

learning_path.title: Data Extraction, Categorization, and Quality
objectives: Learn to extract information from unstructured data, categorize it effectively, and ensure data quality.

prerequisites.title: Introduction to Data Handling and Ethics

learning_path.title: Database Design and Data Modeling Fundamentals
objectives: Learn the fundamentals of database design and how to create effective data models.

learning_path.title: Introduction to Data Processing Techniques
objectives: Learn to apply basic data processing techniques to clean, transform, and prepare data for analysis.

prerequisites.title: Database Design and Data Modeling Fundamentals

learning_path.title: Data Mining Fundamentals
objectives: Understand the basics of data mining and how to extract valuable insights from data.

learning_path.title: Querying Data with Query Languages
objectives: Learn to use query languages to retrieve and manipulate data from databases.

prerequisites.title: Database Design and Data Modeling Fundamentals

learning_path.title: Data Visualization Techniques
objectives: Learn to create effective data visualizations to communicate insights.

learning_path.title: Advanced Data Processing and Analysis
objectives: Apply advanced data processing techniques and perform complex data analysis.

learning_path.title: RDF Query Language and Semantic Data
objectives: Learn to use RDF query language to query and manipulate semantic data.

learning_path.title: Data Governance and Documentation
objectives: Learn to establish data governance processes and create comprehensive technical documentation.
